ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe
ham.body:
Hi,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office with limited access to email. I will return on 2026-04-20 and will respond to your message upon my return.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact Jane Smith at jane.smith@example.com or call 555-123-4567.

Best regards,
John Doe

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear Microsoft 365 User,

Our records indicate that your Microsoft 365 account password will expire in 3 days. To maintain uninterrupted access to your email, OneDrive, Teams, and other services, you must update your password immediately.

Please click the link below to verify your account and reset your password:
<URL>

Failure to act within the specified time will result in account suspension.

Thank you,
Microsoft Support Team
